name: Oura Ring
description: Oura Ring is a health and wellness wearable that tracks sleep, activity, readiness, heart rate, HRV, stress, SpO2, and body temperature. The API v2 provides access to daily summaries, detailed sleep sessions, heart rate data, workout sessions, tags, and personal biometric information.

capabilities.name: daily_sleep_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily sleep score summaries for a date range.

capabilities.name: daily_activity_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily activity score summaries for a date range.

capabilities.name: daily_readiness_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily readiness scores for a date range.

capabilities.name: daily_stress_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily stress data for a date range.

capabilities.name: daily_spo2_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily SpO2 (blood oxygen) averages for a date range.

capabilities.name: daily_resilience_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily resilience data for a date range.

capabilities.name: sleep_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed sleep session data with stages, HR, HRV, and movement.

capabilities.name: sleep_time_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve recommended sleep time windows.

capabilities.name: heart_rate_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve continuous heart rate measurements.

capabilities.name: workout_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve workout sessions with activity type, duration, and intensity.

capabilities.name: session_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve rest and relaxation sessions (meditation, breathing, nap).

capabilities.name: tag_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve user-created tags and annotations.

capabilities.name: enhanced_tag_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve enhanced tags with additional metadata.

capabilities.name: personal_info_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's personal profile information.

capabilities.name: ring_configuration_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve ring configuration and setup details.

capabilities.name: rest_mode_period_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve rest mode period data.

capabilities.name: daily_cardiovascular_age_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve estimated cardiovascular age data.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscription_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook subscription for data updates.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscription_list
capabilities.description: List active webhook subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscription_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription.
